---
name: Change request
about: Request a contract, schema, or validation change
title: '[Change] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

Describe the requested change.

## Why this is needed

Explain the problem, constraint, or opportunity.

## Scope

- [ ] Schema or contract change
- [ ] Validation rule change
- [ ] Documentation change
- [ ] Cross-repository rollout coordination

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Affected consumers are identified
- [ ] Backward compatibility expectation is explicit
- [ ] Validation impact is explicit
- [ ] Documentation updates in English are identified

## Notes

Add affected services, SDKs, or migration details here.
